tshirt_pricing.description: Bulk T-Shirts start with ₹50 reduction from original selling price. For every additional 20 pieces ordered, reduce the current price by 10 percent until the price reaches half of the original selling price.

lower_pricing.description: Bulk Lowers start with ₹50 reduction from original selling price. For every additional 20 pieces ordered, reduce the current price by 10 percent until the price reaches half of the original selling price.

track_suit_pricing.description: Bulk Track Suits start with ₹200 reduction from original selling price. For every additional 20 pieces ordered, reduce another ₹100 from the current price. No further reductions are applied after reducing 500 rupees.

customization_policy.message: Customization charges should be calculated using customization.json.
